headlines.title: Spanish island braces for hantavirus cruise ship as WHO urges calm amid protests
headlines.description: TENERIFE, Spain — The head of the World Health Organization on Saturday made an appeal to locals in Tenerife to remain calm as the Spanish island prepared to receive passengers from a hantavirus-hit cruise ship that has left three people dead and sparked growing local outrage

headlines.title: More than 100 sickened in norovirus outbreak aboard Caribbean Princess cruise
headlines.description: Even after more than 100 passengers and crewmembers fell sick during a norovirus outbreak aboard the Caribbean Princess cruise ship, passenger Jan van Milligen said life on board still felt surprisingly normal.“The normal atmosphere is still here,” van Milligen, who has spent the last 21 days aboard the ship with relatives and friends from South Africa, told NBC News on Saturday.

headlines.title: Covid-19 cruise passengers recall painful memories amid hantavirus outbreak
headlines.description: The recent coverage of a cruise ship hit with a deadly hantavirus outbreak is painfully familiar to cruisers who spent days and weeks trapped in their cabins at the start of the Covid-19 pandemic in 2020

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran exchange fire as Trump says ceasefire still holds
headlines.description: U.S. fighter jets struck two Iranian oil tankers accused of violating a U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, as Iran launched new missile and drone attacks targeting the United Arab Emirates. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Passengers on Frontier jet that killed person on runway describe scene on board
headlines.description: Passengers on the Frontier Airlines jet that hit and killed a person on a runway at the Denver airport share their experience of what happened during the incident. Frontier says all 224 passengers and seven crew members were safely evacuated using slides.

headlines.title: North Korean troops join Putin’s scaled-back parade as Ukraine agrees temporary ceasefire
headlines.description: There were no neat rows of tanks or ballistic missile carriers rolling down the smooth cobbles of Moscow’s Red Square on Saturday, as Russia scaled back what is usually a grand militaristic Victory Day parade celebrating the Soviet Union’s role in defeating Nazi Germany

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Woman survives car being cut in half
headlines.description: A 19-year-old Michigan teen survived a terrifying crash after a speeding driver hit her car, ripping it in two. NBC News' George Solis reports.

headlines.title: At age 100, she's still working the farm she started
headlines.description: At age 100, she's still working the farm she started

headlines.title: Special needs student suspended over LEGO gun
headlines.description: A mother in Georgia is questioning why her 8-year-old son was suspended after bringing what she says was a small gun made out of LEGOs to school.

headlines.title: Passenger recalls moment plane struck person on runway
headlines.description: Passenger recalls moment plane struck person on runway

headlines.title: Spain to evacuate cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak
headlines.description: Spain to evacuate cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak
